title: pigea fasciculata
intro: Pigea fasciculata, also known as Pigea fasciculata or Pigea fasciculata, is a flowering plant species within the Apocynaceae family. While information on Pigea fasciculata is limited, I found that Pigea fasciculata is a plant that has been used in traditional medicine, however, I do not have information on its medicinal properties, health benefits, or herbal preparations.
